quintBinding.driverGuidanceMarkdown:
- Implement a Rust replay harness for each executable QNT/MBT branch set.
- Dispatch observed QNT action names inside quarantined harness adapter modules only.
- Project Rust engine state into the exact comparison shape named by the QNT driver.
quintBinding.name: Rust quint-connect harness
quintBinding.reproductionMarkdown: Use the target harness seed or trace id recorded in `tasks/target-replay-evidence/*.json` to reproduce a failing Rust quint-connect run.
